basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH)
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website [ICMR NIRDH Official Website]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR NIRDH Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 30 to 70 years with MBBS/BDS or equivalent degree and 7 years post-qualification experience (PhD and MD/MS/MDS experience count as specified) are eligible to apply for this Consultant position. The online application process for ICMR NIRDH Consultant Recruitment 2026 has started on 05 May 2026 and

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 70 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or BDS or PhD, MD/MS/MDS
qualification.details: MBBS/BDS or equivalent degree + 7 years post-qualification experience OR Retired Govt. employees in Pay Level-10+ with 7 years experience. PhD counts as 4 years experience. MD/MS/MDS counts as 3 years experience.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application and documents Written test (if required) Interview/Personal discussion
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR NIRDH Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR NIRDH to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR-NIRDH Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ICMR-NIRDH Consultant (Scientific – Medical) post is 27th May 2026. Ensure you apply before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS or BDS or equivalent degree. Additionally, at least 7 years of post-qualification experience is required. PhD is considered equivalent to 4 years of experience, and MD/MS/MDS to 3 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Consultant (Scientific – Medical) position is 30 years, and the maximum age limit is 70 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Consultant (Scientific – Medical) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,25,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Consultant (Scientific – Medical) at ICMR-NIRDH.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the ICMR-NIRDH Consultant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications and documents, followed by a written test (if deemed necessary), and finally an interview or personal discussion.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Consultant (Scientific – Medical) at ICMR-NIRDH is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
